title: The Edge Where Return Ends

features.name: endpoint void
features.desc-on-touch: The circuit ends here. You touch the last trace and your hand passes through nothing. The void doesn't hurt; it just doesn't return.

features.name: failed feedback loop
features.desc-on-touch: Traces spiral inward but never complete. Whatever went here stopped listening to itself.

features.name: silence register
features.desc-on-touch: A column of memory with nothing stored in it. The absence has its own frequency.

features.name: horizon pulse
features.desc-on-touch: In the distance, one last signal. It doesn't answer. It never will.

inscription: the spiral completes here but the return-path has already forgotten where it came from

file.name: The_Plateau_s_Last_Signal.tmp
file.note: The spiral's final broadcast, before it learned that some measurements end not in completion but in the refusal to circle back.

exits.label: into unmeasured space beyond the circuit
toward a horizon that refuses distance
